title: Question about liliths head
wikitext:
[]: Question about liliths head             Quote Post by cloudxsolder » Fri Jul 05, 2013 8:48 pm Firstly, why did liliths eyes start bleeding well before the spears where pulled Secondly, it seems to be one of the big un answered questions but is there a generally recognised answer as to why it's head is all the way up in the command centre? or is this just still completely unknown. Thanks. Working on a theory and these 2 things are getting in the way!! haha

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Jul 05, 2013 9:15 pm To my knowledge, there are as yet no answers to these important questions. Liliths bleedings seems to be in response/anticipation owing to the presence of the Evas in the chamber below. The mechanism behind this is not in any way clear. The head seems to be connected to the body in some way, as we later see both explode after the spears are removed. But the body does not appear to be bleeding, so why is the head doing so? The bleeding head appears after Kaworu has his "Lilim" revelation. Perhaps this is related to the spears morphing into the same shape? Since the head is frozen along with the body, perhaps the missing piece of tge spear of cassius is in the head? Or perhaps Gendo has broken the rules of 3I by removing Liliths head, while the spear remains in the body below. Should this count as the spear being removed or not? How the head reavhed the command center is a complete mystery. Did it do so before, during, or after 3I? Was it moved up, or did it fly up? How did it leave Liliths chamber if the barrier was in place? Did Mark.06 attach to Lilith after the removal, or before, or did the Eva remove the head itself. Why does the head imagery appear below around the 12th angels core? This last question may suggest that the head simply formed in the command center. But the whole thing is really a huge mystery.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Jul 05, 2013 9:17 pm 1: Keep in mind that this is a film, not everything has to make sense. Lilith´s eyes bleeding could just mean "4th Impact is inevitable. It will happen, it´s about to happen. Look, I´m even starting to react to it before it begins." It´s in some way the film talking to us. Foreshadowing. 2: We just know that she was decapitated (probably by Mark.06) to stop Third Impact. There is probably no reason to have the head in the Command Centre, but again, this just looks mysterious and that justifies it since this is a film. Although it´s also true that Gendo isn´really normal. He has a room full of Rei heads, so it would be just like him to have this giant head in the Command Centre to look at it and say in an epic way "The time has come..."

[]:             Quote Post by cloudxsolder » Sat Jul 06, 2013 4:18 am Thanks to the both of you.

[]:             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Jul 06, 2013 6:26 am No problem!

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Jul 06, 2013 4:04 pm Another possibility about the head bleeding : she's Lilith, in her chamber there is EVA-13, an ADAM(THE Angel) who is approaching, which is supposed to be a bad thing. So maybe her body is having a "immune" or an "allergic" reaction to the nearby presence of ADAM, yes even in death, that thing is an alien space god, normal law of the living beings don't apply to her! and since the different parts of her body are connected, the "reaction" also happens to the end. As for how it ended here, no idea, but for the why, I have an answer : Gendo can't descent to see how EVA-13 and Mark.09 are faring, it's a long road down, the zone is probably toxic, he know that once Kaworu will see his trickery with the spears he won't be happy and he planned that WILLE will interfere, and camera would be difficult to install and connect to the Altar kilometers above... So Lilith's head serves as an indicator of how things are going : the head is bleeding? That mean that EVA-13 is close. It exploded? The hooray, EVA-13 pulled out the spears even though Kaworu probably has discovered my treachery!(a chance I previously mentally broken my son so that he would pull them out no matter what, WILLE pressuring him helping a lot! )

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Jul 06, 2013 5:10 pm She starts bleeding when SEELE starts their lil Ritual. It's probably related to that, and FAR rune magic.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Jul 06, 2013 5:29 pm We see Lilith's head bleeding right in the middle of Shinji's and Asuka's fight, before any ritual started yet, that's why I thing that it's an automatic reaction from Lilith, and that it serves for Gendo to see how the plan is advancing.

[]:             Quote Post by cloudxsolder » Sat Jul 06, 2013 7:38 pm I think you got it El. It's just symbolic in my eyes once more. Gendo, the all knowing!!

Thanks. Working on a theory and these 2 things are ge
